description: A sophisticated threat actor attributed to Russian intelligence services, active since at least 2008. Known for long-term, stealthy operations targeting government, diplomatic, and technology organisations.
scenario: Suspicious activity has been identified across cloud infrastructure and endpoints within the organisation. Initial indicators suggest a long-running intrusion with low-and-slow reconnaissance behaviour. Investigate the telemetry to determine the scope, methodology, and impact of the activity.
environment_note: This group is known to operate heavily within cloud environments. Focus your investigation on both cloud API activity and endpoint telemetry.
